creation_theology.significance: light: First act of creation - light precedes luminaries; speech: Creation by word - power of divine speech
separation: Fundamental creative act - ordering from chaos
naming: Authority and relationship - God names and defines
life: Biological creation - plants, animals, humanity
image: Humanity as divine reflection - covenant partners

numerical_significance.significance: Divisible by 26 (YHWH = 26) - suggests divine presence marker; Divisible by 13 - covenant/love pattern
